fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKPathBuilder` provides a mutable builder for constructing an <xref:SkiaSharp.SKPath> incrementally. Add contours, arcs, curves, and shapes, then call <xref:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder.Snapshot> to obtain an immutable snapshot or <xref:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder.Detach> to transfer ownership of the path.

This type wraps a native Skia resource and implements `IDisposable`. Always dispose of it when done, either with a `using` statement or by calling `Dispose()` directly.

## Examples

```csharp
using var builder = new SKPathBuilder();
builder.MoveTo(10, 10);
builder.LineTo(100, 10);
builder.LineTo(100, 100);
builder.Close();
using var path = builder.Detach();
canvas.DrawPath(path, paint);
```
]]></format>
fields.summary: Provides a mutable builder for constructing an <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPath" /> incrementally.
Initializes a new instance of the <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder" /> class.

entries.signature: public SKPathBuilder ();

params.path: The path whose contours are copied into the new builder.

fields.summary: Initializes a new instance of the <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder" /> class with the contents of an existing path.

entries.signature: public SKPathBuilder (SkiaSharp.SKPath path);

params.sweepAngle: The sweep angle in degrees, measured clockwise from <paramref name="startAngle" />.
params.oval: The bounding rectangle of the oval that defines the arc.
params.startAngle: The start angle in degrees, measured clockwise from the positive x-axis.

fields.summary: Appends an arc of the specified oval to the path as a new contour.

entries.signature: public void AddArc (SkiaSharp.SKRect oval, float startAngle, float sweepAngle);

params.x: The x-coordinate of the center of the circle.
params.y: The y-coordinate of the center of the circle.
params.dir: One of the enumeration values that specifies the winding direction of the circle contour.

fields.summary: Appends a closed circle contour to the path.

entries.signature: public void AddCircle (float x, float y, float radius, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection dir = SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection.Clockwise);

params.rect: The bounding rectangle of the oval.
params.direction: One of the enumeration values that specifies the winding direction of the oval contour.

entries.signature: public void AddOval (SkiaSharp.SKRect rect, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection direction = SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection.Clockwise);

params.other: The path whose contours are appended to the current path.

fields.summary: Appends the contours of another path to the current path.

entries.signature: public void AddPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath other, SkiaSharp.SKPathAddMode mode = SkiaSharp.SKPathAddMode.Append);

params.mode: One of the enumeration values that specifies how the path is appended.
params.matrix: The transformation matrix applied to each point in the source path before appending.
params.other: The path whose contours are appended to the current path.

fields.summary: Appends the contours of another path, transformed by the specified matrix, to the current path.

entries.signature: public void AddPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath other, in SkiaSharp.SKMatrix matrix, SkiaSharp.SKPathAddMode mode = SkiaSharp.SKPathAddMode.Append);

params.dx: The horizontal offset applied to each point in the source path before appending.
params.dy: The vertical offset applied to each point in the source path before appending.
params.mode: One of the enumeration values that specifies how the path is appended.
params.other: The path whose contours are appended to the current path.

entries.signature: public void AddPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath other, float dx, float dy, SkiaSharp.SKPathAddMode mode = SkiaSharp.SKPathAddMode.Append);

params.points: The array of vertices that form the polygon.
params.close: <see langword="true" /> to close the polygon by adding a line back to the first point; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.summary: Appends a polygon contour defined by the specified points to the path.

entries.signature: public void AddPoly (SkiaSharp.SKPoint[] points, bool close = true);

params.points: The read-only span of vertices that form the polygon.
params.close: <see langword="true" /> to close the polygon by adding a line back to the first point; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.summary: Appends a polygon contour defined by the specified points to the path.

entries.signature: public void AddPoly (ReadOnlySpan<SkiaSharp.SKPoint> points, bool close = true);

params.rect: The rectangle to add as a closed contour.

fields.summary: Appends a closed rectangle contour to the path.

entries.signature: public void AddRect (SkiaSharp.SKRect rect, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection direction = SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection.Clockwise);

params.rect: The rectangle to add as a closed contour.
params.direction: One of the enumeration values that specifies the winding direction of the rectangle contour.
params.startIndex: The zero-based corner index (0 through 3) at which the contour begins.

fields.summary: Appends a closed rectangle contour to the path, starting at the specified corner.

entries.signature: public void AddRect (SkiaSharp.SKRect rect, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection direction, uint startIndex);

params.rect: The rounded rectangle to add as a closed contour.

entries.signature: public void AddRoundRect (SkiaSharp.SKRoundRect rect, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection direction, uint startIndex);

params.rect: The bounding rectangle of the rounded rectangle.
params.rx: The x-axis radius of the corner ellipses.
params.ry: The y-axis radius of the corner ellipses.
params.dir: One of the enumeration values that specifies the winding direction of the contour.

entries.signature: public void AddRoundRect (SkiaSharp.SKRect rect, float rx, float ry, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection dir = SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection.Clockwise);

params.radius: The radius of the tangent arc.

fields.summary: Appends a tangent arc between two lines to the current contour.

entries.signature: public void ArcTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point1, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point2, float radius);

params.oval: The bounding rectangle of the oval that defines the arc.
params.startAngle: The start angle in degrees, measured clockwise from the positive x-axis.
params.sweepAngle: The sweep angle in degrees, measured clockwise from <paramref name="startAngle" />.
params.forceMoveTo: <see langword="true" /> to add a move-to before the arc, starting a new contour; <see langword="false" /> to connect the arc to the current point with a line.

fields.summary: Appends an arc of the specified oval to the current contour.

entries.signature: public void ArcTo (SkiaSharp.SKRect oval, float startAngle, float sweepAngle, bool forceMoveTo);

params.r: The radii of the arc ellipse (x-radius and y-radius).
params.xAxisRotate: The rotation of the ellipse x-axis relative to the current coordinate system, in degrees.
params.largeArc: One of the enumeration values that specifies whether to draw the large or small arc.
params.sweep: One of the enumeration values that specifies the winding direction of the arc.
params.xy: The end point of the arc.

fields.summary: Appends an SVG-style elliptical arc to the current contour using the specified radii and end point.

entries.signature: public void ArcTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint r, float xAxisRotate, SkiaSharp.SKPathArcSize largeArc, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection sweep, SkiaSharp.SKPoint xy);

params.x1: The x-coordinate of the first tangent point.
params.y1: The y-coordinate of the first tangent point.
params.x2: The x-coordinate of the second tangent point.
params.y2: The y-coordinate of the second tangent point.
params.radius: The radius of the tangent arc.

fields.summary: Appends a tangent arc between two lines to the current contour.

entries.signature: public void ArcTo (float x1, float y1, float x2, float y2, float radius);

params.rx: The x-radius of the arc ellipse.
params.ry: The y-radius of the arc ellipse.
params.xAxisRotate: The rotation of the ellipse x-axis relative to the current coordinate system, in degrees.
params.largeArc: One of the enumeration values that specifies whether to draw the large or small arc.
params.sweep: One of the enumeration values that specifies the winding direction of the arc.
params.x: The x-coordinate of the end point of the arc.
params.y: The y-coordinate of the end point of the arc.

fields.summary: Appends an SVG-style elliptical arc to the current contour using separate radius and end-point coordinates.

entries.signature: public void ArcTo (float rx, float ry, float xAxisRotate, SkiaSharp.SKPathArcSize largeArc, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection sweep, float x, float y);

fields.summary: Closes the current contour by adding a line from the current point back to the starting point of the contour.

params.w: The weight of the conic, which controls how much the curve is pulled toward the control point.

fields.returns: A new <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPath" /> containing the accumulated contours. The builder is reset after this call.
fields.summary: Detaches the accumulated path from the builder, returning it as a new <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPath" /> and resetting the builder.

entries.signature: public SkiaSharp.SKPath Detach ();

params.disposing: <see langword="true" /> to release both managed and unmanaged resources; <see langword="false" /> to release only unmanaged resources.

fields.summary: Releases the resources used by the current instance of the <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder" /> class.

entries.signature: protected override void Dispose (bool disposing);

fields.summary: Releases the native resources held by the current instance of the <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder" /> class.

params.dy: The y-offset from the current point.

entries.signature: public void RMoveTo (float dx, float dy);

params.point1: The end point, relative to the current point.

entries.signature: public void RQuadTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point0, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point1);

params.dy1: The y-offset of the end point relative to the current point.

fields.returns: A new <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPath" /> that is an immutable snapshot of the current contours. The builder retains its state and can continue to be used.
fields.summary: Returns an immutable snapshot of the current path without resetting the builder.

entries.signature: public SkiaSharp.SKPath Snapshot ();
